messages.content:
Welcome to Level A! I’m super happy to have each and every one of you on board. In the next three years, we'll work together to transform Level A into a haven of warmth and inspiration for all. With your collective efforts, I'm confident we'll achieve that goal. 
This welcome letter aims to inform you of what's in store in Level A and what I'm expecting from you.
Polish the two paragraphs.

Welcome to Level A! I am thrilled to have each and every one of you on board. Over the next three years, we will work hand in hand to transform Level A into a sanctuary of warmth and inspiration for everyone. With your combined determination and dedication, I am confident that we will achieve this goal.

This welcome letter is intended to provide you with an overview of what to expect in Level A and what I anticipate from each of you.

Let's start with Level A’s logo, a creation by the Level A people I taught a few years ago. It's inspired by the magical school that Harry Potter attended, symbolizing that we're all language wizards, ready to unlock the magic of language together. Polish this paragraph.

Let's begin with Level A's logo, a creation conceptualized by the talented individuals whom I had the pleasure of teaching a few years ago. The logo draws inspiration from the enchanting school that Harry Potter attended, serving as a symbol of our shared brilliance as language wizards, poised to unlock the magic of language together.

Aim
Basically you have two goals: achieving your personal best in Gaokao and mastering English for both academic and professional purposes. When it comes to Gaokao, I'm here to guide you. Trust me! My expertise in this domain is unparalleled within our school and possibly beyond. For the second goal, however, it is what you do that will ultimately define your journey. While I'm here to open the door, you must enter by yourself. 
Attitude
Picture learning as a race – sometimes you lead, sometimes you follow. Past achievements don't guarantee future success. Another analogy: learning is like walking in the snow. Every step shows! I hope that when we reach our destination in June 2026, you'll proudly declare, "I treaded this path with care, and each step has guided me to this very moment. I have no regrets at all.”
Approach
The primary learning resources for Level A consist of genuine non-textbook materials, including novels, short stories, speeches, journal articles and more. You will have countless opportunities to listen, speak, read, and write, all contributing to your overall language proficiency. Still, to prepare you for mid-term and final assessments, you will also engage in building test-taking skills with selected content from textbooks and materials used for the entire grade.

Appreciation
This is indeed a magical word. It has the power to transform Level A into a closely-knit family for all. Let’s be grateful to fate because it’s pure luck we can meet. Let’s also value all the efforts everyone will be making here in the coming years. With mutual gratitude, support and love, we will make our journey a huge success. Please polish these paragraphs.

Aim
At Level A, we have two primary goals: to achieve your personal best in Gaokao and to master English for both academic and professional purposes. When it comes to Gaokao preparation, you can rely on my guidance and expertise. Within our school and possibly beyond, my unparalleled knowledge in this domain ensures your success. However, when it comes to mastering English, it is the actions you take that will shape your journey. While I am here to open the door, you must be willing to step through it yourself.

Attitude
Imagine learning as a race, where sometimes you lead, and sometimes you follow. Past accomplishments do not guarantee future triumphs. Another analogy I like to use is that learning is akin to walking in the snow – every step leaves a mark. As we reach our destination in June 2026, I hope you can proudly proclaim, "I treaded this path with care, and each step has guided me to this very moment. I have no regrets."

Approach
At Level A, our primary learning resources consist of authentic non-textbook materials, such as novels, short stories, speeches, journal articles, and more. You will have ample opportunities to engage in listening, speaking, reading, and writing, all of which will contribute to your overall language proficiency. Additionally, to prepare you for mid-term and final assessments, we will also focus on building test-taking skills using selected content from textbooks and materials utilized throughout the grade.

Appreciation
Appreciation – a truly magical word. It possesses the power to transform Level A into a tightly-knit family for all. Let us express our gratitude to fate for the fortunate encounter that brought us together. Furthermore, let us value and cherish the efforts each member of our community will invest in the years to come. With mutual appreciation, support, and love, we will undoubtedly achieve great success on our collective journey.

An active and inspiring classroom environment will greatly contribute to your learning. It’s our shared responsibility to create such an environment. Here are a handful of traits we can learn from those Harvard students. Please keep them in mind and apply them in our class. 
	Be a good listener!
	Be an active, creative, and critical thinker!
	Respond warmly (with applause, raised hands, or heartfelt laughter, etc)
	Take notes! 


Polish these sentences.

An active and inspiring classroom environment will greatly enhance your learning experience. It is our collective responsibility to cultivate such an environment. To guide us in this endeavor, we can draw inspiration from the traits exhibited by Harvard students. Let us bear these qualities in mind and apply them within our class:
- Be an attentive and engaged listener.
- Foster active, creative, and critical thinking.
- Respond warmly, whether through applause, raised hands, or heartfelt laughter.
- Remember to take thorough notes.
Level A的核心价值观 翻译英文

The core values of Level A translated into English are as follows:

1. Excellence: Strive for excellence in all aspects of academic and personal development.
2. Integrity: Uphold honesty, fairness, and ethical conduct in all interactions.
3. Collaboration: Foster a spirit of cooperation, teamwork, and mutual support.
4. Respect: Show respect for oneself, others, and the learning environment.
5. Growth: Embrace a growth mindset, continuously seeking opportunities for learning and improvement.
6. Diversity: Embrace and celebrate the diversity of backgrounds, perspectives, and ideas.
7. Empathy: Cultivate empathy and understanding towards others, promoting a compassionate and inclusive community.
8. Responsibility: Take ownership of one's actions and choices, demonstrating accountability and reliability.

These core values serve as guiding principles for Level A and shape the culture and character of our educational institution.
接下去我跟大家说说Level A的核心理念，了解并践行这些理念，我们一定是最棒的。翻译英文

Next, I would like to share with you the core principles of Level A. By understanding and embodying these principles, we will undoubtedly become the best we can be. Here is the translation in English:

"Now, let me talk to you about the core philosophy of Level A. By understanding and practicing these principles, we will definitely be the best.
Next, I would like to share with you  the core principles of Level A. By understanding and practicing these principles, we will definitely be the best. Polish it.
Now, I am eager to share with all of you the core principles of Level A. By embracing and embodying these principles, we will undoubtedly emerge as the epitome of excellence.

Finally, let me remind you of the following Level A rules, which guarantee that Level A is an efficient and inspiring learning community. 
Rule #1 	Arrive punctually, before the preparatory bell rings.
Rule #2	Bring ONLY English material to class.
Rule #3 	Share smiles, kind words, and kind gestures whenever possible.
Rule #4	APPLAUDE commendable contributions and conduct in class.
Rule #5	RESPOND to your teacher.
Rule #6 	TAKE notes in class.
Rule #7	Willingly push your boundaries.
Rule #8	Form “rituals”.
Polish them.

Finally, allow me to remind you of the Level A rules that ensure an efficient and inspiring learning community:
Rule #1: Arrive promptly, before the preparatory bell rings.
Rule #2: Bring only English materials to class.
Rule #3: Spread smiles, kind words, and acts of kindness whenever possible.
Rule #4: Applaud commendable contributions and conduct in class.
Rule #5: Respond to your teacher.
Rule #6: Take diligent notes during class.
Rule #7: Willingly push your boundaries.
Rule #8: Cultivate meaningful "rituals."

Let us all adhere to these rules, as they play a vital role in establishing an environment that fosters growth, engagement, and success.

Three years might seem a long time, but they pass in a blink. Let us treasure every single day before they crystallize into memories. 
Feel free to reach out to me anytime. I am always here for you. Love you!
Polish this

Though three years may appear lengthy, they have a way of passing us by in the blink of an eye. Let us cherish each and every day, for they will soon transform into precious memories. 
Remember, you can always reach out to me whenever you need support. I am here for you, wholeheartedly. Sending my love to all of you!
